title: Wevangeliwon Showing at Fanime Con and Sean McCoy
display_title: Wevangeliwon Showing at Fanime Con and Sean McCoy
wikitext:
[]: Wevangeliwon Showing at Fanime Con! (and Sean McCoy)             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Apr 01, 2008 1:26 am Merged similar topics together The Fanime website wrote: Neon Genesis Evangelion remains one of the most controversial titles ever to cross the Pacific. What does it all mean? Bring your opinions (but no weapons, please!) to the Evangelion analysis and learn to disagree with Sean McCoy, the voice of analytical commentary on ADV's Platinum DVDs.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Apr 01, 2008 6:56 am ...is he one of the jerkheads?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Apr 01, 2008 8:06 am Sean McCoy, Jerk head. Yes. He was the one who completely agreed with everthing Greenfingers was saying on the commentary for the platinum series. (If I remember correctly, I haven't watched that godforsaken thing since I got it.) I don't think I want to go if him and Greenfingers are gonna be there. But I guess if we get to disagree and yell at him, it might be worth it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Apr 01, 2008 9:51 am Meh, I think it would be too pricy to fly from Finland to there just for lulz This means videos are demanded. AS TORRENTZU PLZ. Or in youtube.

[]:             Quote Post by Steve » Tue Apr 01, 2008 10:00 am Someone please go and declare that you think he represents Shinji's erections.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Apr 01, 2008 10:04 am Nah, he's Shinji's trouser stain

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Apr 05, 2008 9:13 pm FUCK. I live right near Fanime. I have half a mind to go there to bitch at him, but................................................... Hmmm. *debates on what to do*

[]:             Quote Post by Steve » Sun Apr 06, 2008 7:53 am Oh come on, you know you want to. For all of us, if not for yourself!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Apr 06, 2008 11:20 pm I'm not going this year (for the first year EVER, there apparently isn't even an official Gainax panel, and Yamaga isn't coming). Therefore, SSD, it'd be great if you went to the EEP and taped/recounted your experience. Maybe someone could teach Sean something, though I'm sure a bunch of people will be yelling misinformation and I'd just be really frustrated if I went.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Apr 07, 2008 9:51 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: I live right near Fanime. I have half a mind to go there to bitch at him, but...................................................

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Apr 07, 2008 3:21 pm First book new beginning everyone! Put some maiking breakthrough on it and we're done.

[]: Wevangeliwon Showing at Fanime Con!             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat May 03, 2008 12:16 pm EVANGELION 1.0(1?): YOU ARE (NOT) ALONE will be shown this year at Fanime Con in the main video room. I'm not sure whether it'll have subtitles or not, but I doubt it would bother most people here who have seen it with subtitles anyway. It's pretty late to order tickets at this point, but... you know... it's there.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 03, 2008 2:16 pm WHAT?! WHAT?! ZOMG NOW I WANT TO GET DOWN(? OR WAS THAT UP) THERE EVEN THOUGH I DON'T HAVE MUCH MONEY EVEN IF IT'S ONLY FOR ONE DAY ZOMG ZOMG ZOMG <--lives closeby to it EDIT: NAW-kun if you could somehow get over here to San Jose that would rock if we could see it together and just chill at the con. For real reals. EDIT(true)^2: But if not there's always the possibility of seeing 2.0 or maybe even 3.0/4.0 a few years down the road?? argh I really need to get to Fanime at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat May 03, 2008 2:45 pm Sadly, I just confirmed that I won't be able to make it this year, even though it wouldn't be nearly as expensive as expected. If THEY DIDN'T WAIT UNTIL FREAKING MAY TO ANNOUNCE THEY WERE SHOWING IT, it probably would have been more likely. -_- I'll try to make preparations much earlier for next year. I'm guessing they'll probably show 2.0 (if it's even OUT by then...) or at least show a repeat of 1.0. Anyone who will be going (SSD?), try to record or at least offer a detailed recounting of the Endless Evangelion Panel!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 03, 2008 6:21 pm I probably won't go this year just because it's my final quarter at school but I should hopefully get there next year since I'll be at University by then (Semester system instead). Rest assured that regardless, note-taking would occur.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 04, 2008 5:26 pm Somebody really needs to go and see it there and confirm whether there are subtitles or not, as that would probably be indicative of whether there will be subs in the following years. If 2.0 really is rather different from the original series, I don't want to spoil it with a craprip like the first one.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun May 04, 2008 6:35 pm Is there a link with this news on it? I couldn't find it on the fanime.com website.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun May 04, 2008 7:32 pm It doesn't seem to mention it all other than in the PDF file that lists all the video programming. It's in Video 5 on Friday.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 06, 2008 12:15 pm According to that Video 5 list; Rebuild 1.0 (as well as Redeath (Redux??) will be playing. Sadly I couldn't find what day anywhere.... NAW-kun, a little help? Do you know? And apparently, Carl Horn is gonna be a Guest of Honor for Fanime. I might try to get to Fanime for at least one day; possible Friday, but I'm still not certain. Depends on when Rebuild is playing and if I have a shot of actually seeing the damn thing again. (Watching it on a computer sucks; high quality DVD or not.)

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue May 06, 2008 2:19 pm 1.0 is showing on Friday.
